name: Pound Cake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate and let it cool.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate and vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and chopped nuts.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk if needed, until just combined.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
10. Optionally, sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the cooled brownies.
